description:
---
verbatim_request: |
  Refactor bin/aura-parallel and bin/aura-swarm scripts and their related skills into a unified aura-swarm script.
  New flags: --swarm-mode (worktree|intree), --tmux-dest (session|window, default window).
  State dir: ~/.local/state/aura/swarm/. Permission inheritance: bypassPermissions propagates to children.
classification:
  scope: medium
  complexity: medium  
  risk: medium
  domain_novelty: low
---
Merge bin/aura-parallel and bin/aura-swarm into a single unified aura-swarm script with:
1. --swarm-mode {worktree,intree} to select isolation strategy
2. --tmux-dest {session,window} with window as new default
3. State directory at ~/.local/state/aura/swarm/ (XDG-compliant)
4. Permission inheritance: bypassPermissions propagates to children
5. Merge skills/parallel/ + skills/swarm/ into skills/swarm/
6. Update Nix packaging, HM module, CLAUDE.md references
title: REQUEST: Refactor aura-parallel + aura-swarm into unified aura-swarm

references:
  request: aura-plugins-kqtf
  elicit: aura-plugins-mvfw
  urd: aura-plugins-1nla

## Summary

Merge aura-parallel + aura-swarm into unified aura-swarm with mode selection (--swarm-mode worktree|intree), session registry for observability, tmux window mode (--tmux-dest session|window), and XDG-compliant state directories.

## Slices

1. Session Registry Module (scripts/aura_protocol/session_registry.py) — types + YAML-based registry
2. Unified bin/aura-swarm — absorbs aura-parallel, writeShellApplication packaging
3. Deprecation Wrapper (bin/aura-parallel) — thin wrapper that delegates to aura-swarm
4. Skill Consolidation — merge parallel + swarm SKILL.md files
5. Nix + HM Module Updates — writeShellApplication, deprecation wrapper packaging
6. Reference Updates — protocol CLAUDE.md agent orchestration references
title: PROPOSAL-1: Unified aura-swarm refactor
REVIEW-A: End-user alignment review for PROPOSAL-1

description:
---
references:
  request: aura-2x1
  elicit: aura-l50
---

# User Requirements Document: Unified aura-swarm

## R1: Script Consolidation
Merge bin/aura-parallel and bin/aura-swarm into a single bin/aura-swarm script.
bin/aura-parallel becomes a deprecation wrapper that warns and delegates to aura-swarm.

## R2: Swarm Mode Flag
--swarm-mode {worktree,intree}
- worktree: creates git worktree per epic (current aura-swarm behavior)
- intree: operates in current working directory (current aura-parallel behavior)

## R3: tmux Destination Flag
--tmux-dest {session,window} (default: window)
- window: creates tmux windows in an existing or new session
- session: creates separate tmux sessions (legacy behavior)
- When not inside tmux: create a new session, then add windows to it
- Same session name → add window to existing session

## R4: XDG State Directory
All runtime state stored at $XDG_STATE_HOME/aura/swarm/ (default: ~/.local/state/aura/swarm/).
Use XDG_STATE_HOME env var, not hardcoded path.

## R5: Session Registry
Full observability session registry with BCNF-aligned schema.
Fields: session_id, permission_mode, model, pid, working_dir, started_at, parent_session_id, role, epic_id, task_ids, swarm_mode, tmux_session, tmux_window, status, last_activity_at, prompt_hash, git_branch, beads_task_id.
Backends: YAML per session (default), Temporal DB if aurad available.

## R6: Permission Inheritance
Parent permission mode propagated to children via session registry.
If parent is bypassPermissions, children default to bypassPermissions.
Explicit --permission-mode flag overrides inherited value.

## R7: Registry Lifecycle
- Write: aura-swarm writes entries on launch
- Cleanup: lazy on aura-swarm start/status + periodic via aurad if running

## R8: Unified Start Subcommand
--epic always required for start (both modes).
Add -n/--njobs flag for parallel instances.
Intree mode skips worktree creation but still uses beads task discovery.

## R9: Mode-Aware Subcommands
All subcommands work for both modes with appropriate behavior:
- start: in intree skips worktree creation
- status: shows all sessions regardless of mode
- attach: attaches to tmux session/window
- stop: kills agents, in intree no worktree to preserve
- merge: in intree is no-op (already in-tree)
- review: generates review docs in both modes
- cleanup: in intree just kills sessions, in worktree also removes worktree+branch

## R10: Skill Consolidation
Merge skills/parallel/ and skills/swarm/ into single unified skills/swarm/SKILL.md.
Document both --swarm-mode options in one file.

## R11: Nix Packaging Updates
Update flake.nix: remove aura-parallel package, update aura-swarm.
Add deprecation wrapper script for aura-parallel.
Update HM module references.
title: URD: Unified aura-swarm requirements document
